thig6.8:1.1: Four times, five, I ran amok from my dwelling,
thig6.8:1.3: having gained no peace of awareness,
thig6.8:3.3: seven factors for awakening, the eightfold path
thig6.8:4.3: In the first watch of the night,
thig6.8:5.1: In the second watch of the night,
thig6.8:5.3: In the third watch of the night,
thig6.8:5.4: I burst the mass of darkness.
thig6.8:6.1: Then I stayed, suffusing my body
thig6.8:6.3: On the seventh day, I stretched out my legs,
thig6.8:6.4: having burst the mass of darkness.
